speaker: ANTONY
text: We have beat him to his camp. Run one before

speaker: ANTONY
text: And let the Queen know of our gests.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Tomorrow

speaker: ANTONY
text: Before the sun shall see ’s, we’ll spill the blood

speaker: ANTONY
text: That has today escaped. I thank you all,

speaker: ANTONY
text: For doughty-handed are you, and have fought

speaker: ANTONY
text: Not as you served the cause, but as ’t had been

speaker: ANTONY
text: Each man’s like mine. You have shown all Hectors.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Enter the city. Clip your wives, your friends.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Tell them your feats, whilst they with joyful tears

speaker: ANTONY
text: Wash the congealment from your wounds and kiss

speaker: ANTONY
text: The honored gashes whole.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Give me thy hand.

speaker: ANTONY
text: To this great fairy I’ll commend thy acts,

speaker: ANTONY
text: Make her thanks bless thee.—O, thou day o’ th’ world,

speaker: ANTONY
text: Chain mine armed neck. Leap thou, attire and all,

speaker: ANTONY
text: Through proof of harness to my heart, and there

speaker: ANTONY
text: Ride on the pants triumphing.

speaker: CLEOPATRA
text: Lord of lords!

speaker: CLEOPATRA
text: O infinite virtue, com’st thou smiling from

speaker: CLEOPATRA
text: The world’s great snare uncaught?

speaker: ANTONY
text: Mine nightingale,

speaker: ANTONY
text: We have beat them to their beds. What, girl, though gray

speaker: ANTONY
text: Do something mingle with our younger brown, yet ha’ we

speaker: ANTONY
text: A brain that nourishes our nerves and can

speaker: ANTONY
text: Get goal for goal of youth. Behold this man.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Commend unto his lips thy favoring hand.—

speaker: ANTONY
text: Kiss it, my warrior.

speaker: ANTONY
text: He hath fought today

speaker: ANTONY
text: As if a god in hate of mankind had

speaker: ANTONY
text: Destroyed in such a shape.

speaker: CLEOPATRA
text: I’ll give thee, friend,

speaker: CLEOPATRA
text: An armor all of gold. It was a king’s.

speaker: ANTONY
text: He has deserved it, were it carbuncled

speaker: ANTONY
text: Like holy Phoebus’ car. Give me thy hand.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Through Alexandria make a jolly march.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Bear our hacked targets like the men that owe them.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Had our great palace the capacity

speaker: ANTONY
text: To camp this host, we all would sup together

speaker: ANTONY
text: And drink carouses to the next day’s fate,

speaker: ANTONY
text: Which promises royal peril.—Trumpeters,

speaker: ANTONY
text: With brazen din blast you the city’s ear.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Make mingle with our rattling taborins,

speaker: ANTONY
text: That heaven and Earth may strike their sounds together,

speaker: ANTONY
text: Applauding our approach.
